# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  NATInstanceSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  NATInstanceSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  NATInstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow outbound traffic only for NAT instance
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 0
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  NATInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0  # Example AMI ID, replace with appropriate one
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref NATInstanceSubnet1
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref NATInstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref NATInstanceIAMProfile

  NATInstanceIAMProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref NATInstanceRole

  NATInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole

  NATRouteTableSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref NATInstanceSubnet1

  NATRouteTableSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref NATInstanceSubnet2

Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: The ID of the created VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1ID:
    Description: The ID of the public subnet in us-west-2a
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2ID:
    Description: The ID of the public subnet in us-west-2b
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  NATInstancePublicIP:
    Description: The public IP of the NAT instance
    Value: !GetAtt NATInstance.PublicIpAddress
